arts.sum: Swedish international striker Viktor Gyokeres has been linked with a move away from Sporting CP in recent months. Arsenal are reportedly keen on securing his signature, but the player has recently rejected an offer from them. arts.ttl: Arsenal or Man Utd? Ademola Lookman has an EASY transfer decision
arts.sum: Ademola Lookman has been linked with a move to the Premier League - and data shows that there is an easy choice to make. The Italian outlet also say Atalanta will grant Lookman’s wishes to move to a bigger club at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton makes his prediction for Arsenal vs Nottingham Forest
Premier League clubs approve APT rule changes in blow to Manchester City
arts.sum: Associated party transaction changes approved by 16-4 Aston Villa, Newcastle, Nottingham Forest side with City Premier League clubs approved changes to associated party transaction (APT) rules on Friday in the face of opposition led by Manchester City. The alterations were swiftly approved by 16 votes to four, with Aston Villa, Newcastle and Nottingham Forest standing with City. Clubs were asked at a shareholder meeting in central London to pass modest changes to rules relating to deals when they generate income from sources related to their ownership. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'I met with my choice for Arsenal's new sporting director – talks have begun'
arts.sum: Arsenal hero Tomas Rosicky has been tipped to replace Edu as Arsenal's new sporting director, ahead of academy manager Per Mertesacker, by a Gunners legend

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'step up interest' in €120m Premier League superstar
arts.sum: Guimaraes has an Estimated Transfer Value (ETV) of €63.8m, but Fichajes claim that Newcastle will demand a fee in excess of €120m to sell the 27-year-old, meaning he would likely become the most expensive Premier League player in history if he joins Arsenal or Man City next year. While away on international duty with Brazil, Guimaraes addressed interest from Man City during an interview with Globo .
